use_cases: Displaying status labels on dashboard cards and metrics
Showing category or tag badges on content items
Indicating notification counts or alert indicators
Marking feature availability or beta status
Showing validation states on form elements
ai_summary: A lightweight badge/pill component with variant support (default, secondary, destructive, outline) for displaying status labels, tags, and counts. Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant props and integrates seamlessly with dashboard interfaces and SaaS products for conveying categorical or status information.
